Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "SUPERCUDA-4000-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $4000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Supercuda.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $4000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $4020 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then executes the BASIC RUN command to start the game (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the loader).
